build.buildCommand: case "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" in concierge) pnpm --filter callie eve:build ;; escrow-oracle-*) pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@calledit/oracle-signer... ;; *) pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@calledit/engine... ;; esac

deploy.startCommand: case "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" in concierge) pnpm --filter callie eve:start ;; escrow-oracle-*) pnpm --filter @calledit/oracle-signer start ;; *) pnpm --filter @calledit/engine start ;; esac
